message:
fix: update toolchain manifest pins to match tested versions

Update version pins to reflect the actually tested/required toolchain:
- ntm: 1.7.0 -> 1.8.0
- cass: 0.2.0 -> 0.2.2
- cm: 0.2.0 -> 0.2.3 (required: --top was deprecated in 0.2.3)

The cm bump is especially important since b43ed40 switched from
--top to --limit, which requires cm >= 0.2.3.

Closes #10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,29 +13,29 @@
       "platforms": ["linux-x64", "linux-arm64", "darwin-arm64", "darwin-x64", "win-x64"]
     },
     "ntm": {
-      "version": "1.7.0",
+      "version": "1.8.0",
       "install_strategy": "upstream_installer",
-      "install_url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/v1.7.0/install.sh",
-      "install_args": "--version=v1.7.0",
+      "install_url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/v1.8.0/install.sh",
+      "install_args": "--version=v1.8.0",
       "verify_command": "ntm deps -v",
       "verify_success": "exit_code_zero",
       "platforms": ["linux-x64", "linux-arm64", "darwin-arm64", "darwin-x64"],
       "notes": "Not available on Windows (requires tmux)"
     },
     "cass": {
-      "version": "0.2.0",
+      "version": "0.2.2",
       "install_strategy": "upstream_installer",
-      "install_url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search/v0.2.0/install.sh",
-      "install_args": "--version v0.2.0",
+      "install_url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search/v0.2.2/install.sh",
+      "install_args": "--version v0.2.2",
       "verify_command": "cass health",
       "verify_success": "exit_code_zero",
       "platforms": ["linux-x64", "linux-arm64", "darwin-arm64", "darwin-x64", "win-x64"]
     },
     "cm": {
-      "version": "0.2.0",
+      "version": "0.2.3",
       "install_strategy": "upstream_installer",
-      "install_url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system/v0.2.0/install.sh",
-      "install_args": "--version v0.2.0",
+      "install_url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system/v0.2.3/install.sh",
+      "install_args": "--version v0.2.3",
       "verify_command": "cm --version",
       "verify_success": "exit_code_zero",
       "platforms": ["linux-x64", "linux-arm64", "darwin-arm64", "darwin-x64", "win-x64"]
